title: 8 Dividend Aristocrats to Buy Now for a Lifetime of Passive Income
text: Dividend stocks are a great way to protect against a downturn and these are the cream of the crop.

title: My Best Dividend Aristocrats For December 2022
text: NOBL gained 10.31% in October, which brings the Fund's return for the year to a loss of 8.96%. Thus far this month, through November 22nd, the dividend aristocrat ETF is up 6.52%, bringing its year-to-date return to -3.03%.

title: Nelson Peltz' Firm Trims Holdings in Ferguson and Sysco
text: Nelson Peltz (Trades, Portfolio), CEO and a founding partner of Trian Fund Management, disclosed in a regulatory filing its third-quarter 13F portfolio update, revealing that Trian reduced its positions in Ferguson PLC ( FERG , Financial) and Sysco Corp. ( SYY , Financial), two of its top-five holdings . The firm's other top holdings include Invesco Ltd.

title: My 11 Best Dividend Kings For November 2022
text: The 48 Dividend Kings finished October with a nice gain, collectively up 10.85%. Last month, the 11 best dividend kings based on forecasted growth and valuation underperformed the average dividend king return by 55 bps.

title: 3 Dividend Kings Crushing the S&P 500 in 2022
text: Companies in the Dividend King club carry well-established and successful business operations, clearly displayed by their commendable commitment to shareholders over decades of increased dividend payouts.

title: Sysco: A World Series Worthy Dividend Stock
text: In light of the ongoing baseball World Series, I'm looking at a Houston-based company that comes with all the right qualities to generate long-term shareholder wealth. This dividend king has a defensive business model, outperforming growth, improving margins despite inflation, and high free cash flow.

title: Sysco Corporation (SYY) Q1 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Sysco Corporation (NYSE:SYY ) Q1 2023 Earnings Conference Call November 1, 2022 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Kevin Kim – Vice President-Investor Relations Kevin Hourican – President and Chief Executive Officer Aaron Alt – Chief Financial Officer Neil Russell – Senior Vice President-Corporate Affairs and Chief Communications Officer Conference Call Participants Alex Slagle – Jefferies Jake Bartlett – Truist Securities Edward Kelly – Wells Fargo Lauren Silberman – Credit Suisse John Heinbockel – Guggenheim Partners Jeffrey Bernstein – Barclays John Ivankoe – JPMorgan Joshua Long – Stephens Inc. John Glass – Morgan Stanley Nicole Miller – Piper Sandler Kelly Bania – BMO Capital Mark Carden – UBS Jonathan Feeney – Consumer Edge Andrew Wolf – CL King Operator Welcome to Sysco's First Quarter Fiscal Year 2023 Conference Call. As a reminder, today's call is being recorded.

title: Sysco (SYY) Q1 Earnings Lag Estimates, Sales Increase Y/Y
text: Sysco's (SYY) first-quarter fiscal 2023 results reflect gains from the Recipe for Growth plan and the company's efforts to manage cost inflation. Sales and earnings rise year over year.
